file_insights.changes: Added comprehensive Product model with 22 fields and extensive methods
key_additions: UUID primary key for global uniqueness
Image handling: image URL and gallery JSON array
Availability flags: is_active, is_available, is_featured, is_chef_recommended
Product attributes: preparation_time, calories, spicy_level, tags, sort_order
Helper methods: formatted_price, is_orderable, gallery management
Tag management methods: add_tag, remove_tag, has_tag

patterns_discovered.description: Organization FK required on all product queries; documentation emphasizes EVERY query MUST filter by organization
patterns_discovered.location: Product model docstring and FK definition

patterns_discovered.description: Uses SoftDeleteMixin and SoftDeleteManager; explicit warning against calling delete() directly
JSONField for gallery (image URLs) and tags (normalized strings) with helper methods
patterns_discovered.location: gallery and tags fields with dedicated management methods

patterns_discovered.description: Slugs must be unique within category via unique_together constraint
5 database indexes covering common query patterns: category+sort, organization+deleted, organization+active+available, organization+featured, organization+chef_recommended
Read-only properties for is_orderable, formatted_price, gallery_count, has_gallery
Configurable currency with symbol mapping for display formatting
Tags stored as lowercase with strip() normalization for consistency

gotchas_discovered.description: All product queries MUST filter by organization; failure to do so exposes data across tenants
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Model docstring includes explicit warning and usage examples

gotchas_discovered.description: Default objects manager excludes soft-deleted records; all_objects manager includes them
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Two managers provided; documentation clarifies distinction

gotchas_discovered.description: JSONField mutations require explicit save() call; helper methods handle this but direct mutations won't persist
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Dedicated methods (add_gallery_image, add_tag) ensure proper persistence

gotchas_discovered.description: Slug uniqueness is per-category, not global; same slug can exist in different categories
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: unique_together constraint explicitly defines category+slug scope

gotchas_discovered.description: formatted_price only handles TRY, USD, EUR, GBP; falls back to currency code for others
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Fallback behavior provided; extensible via dict modification

approach_outcome.description: Comprehensive Product model implementation with all required fields and functionality
approach_outcome.completeness: All specified fields implemented: price, gallery, availability flags (is_available), featured (is_featured), chef recommended (is_chef_recommended)
additional_value: Helper methods for common operations (gallery management, tag management)
Spicy level display with visual representation
approach_outcome.code_standards: Follows Django best practices with verbose_name, help_text, proper field validation, and Meta configuration

recommendations.recommendation: Add field-level validators for spicy_level (0-5 range) and base_price (positive values)
recommendations.rationale: Prevents invalid data at model level

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite covering: multi-tenant isolation, soft delete behavior, gallery/tag management, pricing formatting
recommendations.rationale: Critical fields require robust test coverage, especially multi-tenant isolation

recommendations.recommendation: Create Django migration file to apply schema changes and indexes
recommendations.rationale: Model changes require database migration for deployment

recommendations.recommendation: Create API documentation for product endpoints noting organization filter requirement
recommendations.rationale: Multi-tenant isolation is critical; API developers must understand requirement

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding select_related/prefetch_related helpers for category and organization FK queries
recommendations.rationale: FK traversal in __str__ and menu property could cause N+1 queries

recommendations.recommendation: Add queryset methods (featured_only, available_only, chef_picks) for common filtering patterns
recommendations.rationale: Would reduce query repetition in views and improve code readability
